reviews.comment:
Me cargaron gasoil en vez de infinia nafta, el motor del auto tiene daños graves seguramente únicie una demanda. No responden los llamados

(Translated by Google)
They filled my car with diesel instead of Infinia gasoline; the engine is seriously damaged. I'll definitely file a lawsuit. They're not answering my calls.

reviews.comment:
Me asistieron con el inconveniente del vehículo y me recomendaron ACA para la asistencia técnica. El servicio técnico llevo en 30 minutos. Si bien no me lo resolvieron me dieron la dirección del taller a dónde poder llevar el auto para la reparación. Agradecido de justamente cargar combustible ahí.

(Translated by Google)
They helped me with my vehicle problem and recommended ACA for technical assistance. The service technician arrived in 30 minutes. Although they couldn't fix the problem, they gave me the address of the workshop where I could take the car for repairs. I'm grateful I happened to fill up there.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/12748059352839021938/reviews/Ci9DQUlRQUNvZENodHljRjlvT2pWTVptZ3hUbEJQVlVKWVVtOWtPRkprVGxrNVkyYxAB
